arts.ttl: Preview: PSV Eindhoven vs. Ajax - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Eredivisie clash between PSV Eindhoven and Ajax, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Eredivisie leaders Ajax will travel to Philips Stadion on Sunday to take on their closest challengers, PSV, in what promises to be a thrilling match. Ajax currently sit six points ahead of second-plac...
